source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 국내 제조인증/[A-PTR-BLU] 성능시험성적서.docx

document.title: 성능 시험 성적서 / Performance Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report confirming performance settings for medical image acquisition device models G1417CW, G1417FW, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports performance verification for the medical image acquisition device models listed in the report.
keyPoints: Revision history shows Rev. No. 0 issued on 2025.04.08 as first establishment.
Testing was performed from 2025.04.07 to 2025.04.08 at ㈜에이치앤아비즈 in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
All summarized test items are reported as PASS.
The conclusion states that the performance setting values for 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종) had no abnormalities.

evidence.claim: The document overview states the report is for performance confirmation of 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종).
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종)의 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Image Acquisition Device Performance Verification

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.04.07 to 2025.04.08.
The test location was ㈜에이치앤아비즈 in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 1층일부)

evidence.claim: CsI deposition thickness testing passed for 300μm type and 500μm type models.
evidence.evidenceText:
CsI Deposition

Thickness

(CsI 증착 두께 확인)

300μm type: 330μm ± 10%

500μm type: 500μm ± 10%

PASS

evidence.claim: The measured CsI deposition thickness results were 338.41μm for 300μm type and 507.54μm for 500μm type.
evidence.evidenceText:
* 시험 결과

1) 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족

2) 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type verification passed for PIN-TFT and Flexible PIN-TFT variants.

PASS

(a-Si, IGZO)

PASS

evidence.evidenceText:
Scintillator 확인

CsI

사양서 확인

PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number verification passed for the model groups and their specified minimum pixel counts.
evidence.evidenceText:
Effective Pixel Number 확인

2500 x 3052 pixels 이상

3040 x 3040 pixels 이상

3072 x 3072 pixels 이상

PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area verification passed for specified areas of 350 x 427.3mm, 425.6 x 425.6mm, and 430.1 x 430.1mm within ±10%.
evidence.evidenceText:
Effective Pixel Area 확인

350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내

425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내

430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내

evidence.claim: Pixel pitch testing passed against a 140μm ± 10% criterion.
evidence.evidenceText:
Pixel pitch

140μm ± 10%

확인된 Pixel area를 Pixel number로 나눠 기준값 이내인지 확인.

PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing passed for all listed models.
evidence.evidenceText:
MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다.

* 조사 조건

RQA5

Beam condition,

70kV, 40mAs

21mm Al filter

SID: 150cm

PASS

evidence.evidenceText:
DQE

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing passed for all listed models against center criteria of 110 LSB/uGy or 150 LSB/uGy depending on model group.
evidence.evidenceText:
Sensitivity

Center 기준 110 LSB/uGy 이상

Center 기준 150 LSB/uGy 이상

PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing passed for normal operation at 40kvp and 150kvp.
evidence.evidenceText:
Energy range

40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작

40kvp / 150kvp로 조사시 영상획득되는지 확인.

PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion testing passed for 14 and 16 bits.
evidence.evidenceText:
A/D Conversion

14, 16bits

ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: The wireless standard criterion is IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and the test result passed.
evidence.evidenceText:
Wireless standard

IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac

Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인

PASS

evidence.claim: The IP range criterion is IP68 according to IEC 60529 and the test result passed.
evidence.evidenceText:
IP Range

IP68

IEC 60529에 따른다

PASS

evidence.claim: The communication criterion is 1Giga-bit Ethernet and the test result passed.
evidence.evidenceText:
Communication

1Giga-bit Ethernet

사양서 확인

PASS

evidence.evidenceText:
Trigger mode

Line trigger 모드 정상동작

Auto trigger 모드 정상동작

PASS

evidence.claim: The report conclusion states there were no abnormalities in the performance setting values for the medical image acquisition device.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종)의 성능 설정값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.
evidence.pageTarget: Medical Image Acquisition Device Performance Verification

evidence.claim: The attachments include a-Si specification, IGZO specification, CsI specification, Wifi module specification, IP68 test reports for G1417CW and G1717CW, IMX8 datasheet, and KGMP certificate of conformity.
evidence.evidenceText:
[첨부 1.1] a-Si 사양서

[첨부 1.2] IGZO 사양서

[첨부 2.] CsI 사양서

[첨부 3.] Wifi module 사양서

[첨부 4.1] IP68 test report(G1417CW)

[첨부 4.2] IP68 test report(G1717CW)

[첨부 5.] IMX8 DATASHHET

[첨부 6.] KGMP 적합인정서

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the source text; authoritySignal metadata indicates MFDS/domestic but the document body only includes a KGMP certificate attachment reference.
No formal document number or controlled document identifier is present in the extracted source text.
OCR or preprocessing appears imperfect in places, including duplicated item number 17 and misspelling 'IMX8 DATASHHET'.
